tags.name: `mc-date-range`
tags.description:
Purpose: Display a date range picker with two connected date inputs and a calendar pop-up
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: When you need to select a range of dates
When not to use: When you only need to select a single date
Works with components: mc-accordion-item, mc-card, mc-drawer, mc-modal, mc-popover, mc-tooltip
Alternative component names: Date Range Picker, Date Range Selector, Date Range Input

Events:

  * `input` {`InputEvent`} - Fired when the character is entered.

  * `inputdateselected` {`CustomEvent<string>`} - Fired only when date is selected in the calendar.

  * `focus` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when an input in mc-date-range is focused.

  * `blur` {`FocusEvent`} - Fired when an input in mc-date-range is going out of focus.

  * `click` {`MouseEvent`} - Fired on mc-date-range click.

  * `keydown` {`KeyboardEvent`} - Fired when a key on keydown is pressed.

Slots:

  * ``from`` {} - Only utilize the slot designated for the 'from' if customization on its corresponding mc-input-date is required.

  * ``to`` {} - Only utilize the slot designated for the 'to' if customization on its corresponding mc-input-date is required.

  * ``legend`` {} - The legend HTML to use for the mc-date-range.

Attributes:

  * `autocomplete` {`string`} - 

  * `calendarposition` {`Position`} - 

  * `customize` {`CellCustomizationPayload[] | undefined`} - 

  * `customstyles` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - 

  * `format` - 

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hiddenlegend` {`boolean`} - 

  * `icon` {`string`} - 

  * `labelposition` {`LabelPosition`} - 

  * `loading` {`boolean`} - 

  * `locale` - 

  * `max` {`Max`} - 

  * `min` {`Min`} - 

  * `nextlabel` - 

  * `placeholder` - 

  * `previouslabel` - 

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - 

  * `showadjacentmonthdays` {`boolean`} - 

  * `showweeknumbers` {`boolean`} - 

  * `size` {`Size`} - 

  * `startofweek` - 

  * `variant` {`Variant`} - 

  * `width` - 

  * `yearcap` - 

  * `clearbutton` {`boolean`} - Whether to display a clear button.

  * `keepclearbuttonvisible` {`boolean`} - Keep clearbutton visiable at all times (not only during input focus)',

  * `fromlabel` {`string | null | undefined`} - The label associated with the 'from' date input.
It can also be supplied using the 'label' slot on
the mc-input-date passed as 'from' slot.

  * `legend` {`string | null | undefined`} - Fieldset legend can be passed as a slot, or property.

  * `tolabel` {`string | null | undefined`} - The label associated with the 'to' date input.
It can also be supplied using the 'label' slot on
the mc-input-date passed as 'to' slot.

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - To preserve the orientation on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), 'autolayoutdisabled' must be set to `true` in cases where the component cannot fit the layout with the current orientation..

  * `autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - By default, on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), the component's `orientation` is switched to vertical,
regardless of the set orientation. However, setting `disabledautolayout` to `true`
prevents this and preserves the current `orientation` setting.

  * `disabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `name` {`string`} - 

  * `value` {`IDateRangeValue | null | undefined`} - The value, where "to" and "from" stand in for the beginning and ending dates.

  * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - 

  * `type` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `required` {`boolean`} - 

Properties:

  * `internals` {`ElementInternals`} - 

  * `firstUpdate` {`boolean`} - 

  * `fromInput` - 

  * `toInput` - 

  * `legendElements` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `hasSlotLegend` {`boolean`} - 

  * `legendVisible` {`boolean`} - 

  * `from` {`McInputDate[] | undefined`} - 

  * `to` {`McInputDate[] | undefined`} - 

  * `autocomplete` {`string`} - 

  * `calendarposition` {`Position`} - 

  * `customize` {`CellCustomizationPayload[] | undefined`} - 

  * `customstyles` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - 

  * `format` - 

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hiddenlegend` {`boolean`} - 

  * `icon` {`string`} - 

  * `labelposition` {`LabelPosition`} - 

  * `loading` {`boolean`} - 

  * `locale` - 

  * `max` {`Max`} - 

  * `min` {`Min`} - 

  * `nextlabel` - 

  * `placeholder` - 

  * `previouslabel` - 

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - 

  * `showadjacentmonthdays` {`boolean`} - 

  * `showweeknumbers` {`boolean`} - 

  * `size` {`Size`} - 

  * `startofweek` - 

  * `variant` {`Variant`} - 

  * `width` - 

  * `yearcap` - 

  * `onFromDateBlurred` - 

  * `onToDateBlurred` - 

  * `onFromDateSelected` - 

  * `onToDateSelected` - 

  * `clearbutton` {`boolean`} - Whether to display a clear button.

  * `keepclearbuttonvisible` {`boolean`} - Keep clearbutton visiable at all times (not only during input focus)',

  * `fromlabel` {`string | null | undefined`} - The label associated with the 'from' date input.
It can also be supplied using the 'label' slot on
the mc-input-date passed as 'from' slot.

  * `legend` {`string | null | undefined`} - Fieldset legend can be passed as a slot, or property.

  * `tolabel` {`string | null | undefined`} - The label associated with the 'to' date input.
It can also be supplied using the 'label' slot on
the mc-input-date passed as 'to' slot.

  * `validity` {`ValidityState`} - 

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - To preserve the orientation on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), 'autolayoutdisabled' must be set to `true` in cases where the component cannot fit the layout with the current orientation..

  * `autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - By default, on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), the component's `orientation` is switched to vertical,
regardless of the set orientation. However, setting `disabledautolayout` to `true`
prevents this and preserves the current `orientation` setting.

  * `disabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `_onMouseDown` - 

  * `name` {`string`} - 

  * `value` {`IDateRangeValue | null | undefined`} - The value, where "to" and "from" stand in for the beginning and ending dates.

  * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - 

  * `type` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `required` {`boolean`} - 

  * `hiddenInput` {`HTMLInputElement | undefined`} - 

  * `controlType` {`string`} - 

  * `isCheckable` {`boolean`} - 

  * `inputType` {`string`} -

attributes.name: clearbutton
attributes.description:
`clearbutton` {`boolean`} - Whether to display a clear button.

Property: clearbutton

Default: false

attributes.name: keepclearbuttonvisible
attributes.description:
`keepclearbuttonvisible` {`boolean`} - Keep clearbutton visiable at all times (not only during input focus)',

Property: keepclearbuttonvisible

Default: false

`fromlabel` {`string | null | undefined`} - The label associated with the 'from' date input.
It can also be supplied using the 'label' slot on
the mc-input-date passed as 'from' slot.

Property: fromlabel

Default: fromLabel

attributes.name: legend
attributes.description:
`legend` {`string | null | undefined`} - Fieldset legend can be passed as a slot, or property.

Property: legend

Default: null

attributes.name: tolabel
attributes.description:
`tolabel` {`string | null | undefined`} - The label associated with the 'to' date input.
It can also be supplied using the 'label' slot on

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description:
`orientation` {`Orientation`} - To preserve the orientation on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), 'autolayoutdisabled' must be set to `true` in cases where the component cannot fit the layout with the current orientation..

Property: orientation

Default: horizontal

attributes.name: autolayoutdisabled
attributes.description:
`autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - By default, on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), the component's `orientation` is switched to vertical,
regardless of the set orientation. However, setting `disabledautolayout` to `true`
prevents this and preserves the current `orientation` setting.

Property: autolayoutdisabled

Default: false

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
`value` {`IDateRangeValue | null | undefined`} - The value, where "to" and "from" stand in for the beginning and ending dates.

Property: value
